# Prompt 09 — Foundation layer build (`/services/system-builds/foundation`)

## Priority

**P09 — Governance spine.** React page packages “Foundation System 01” framing (`src/app/(site)/services/system-builds/foundation/page.tsx`, Stitch `ac6050ab602a430ba46c7b92df902b87`). **Related HTML:** `governance-ethics-system-build.html` covers part of the story but **not** the **hub + bridge** copy the React page uses (two foundational builds, clarity, operating ethics).

## Deliverable

- `docs/html/foundation-layer-build.html` that can either **supersede** parts of `governance-ethics-system-build.html` or **link** from it — pick **one** canonical governance story to avoid duplicate SEO; state the choice in an HTML comment at top.

## Source documents

| Path | Use for |
| --- | --- |
| `src/app/(site)/services/system-builds/foundation/page.tsx` | Headlines, section structure, dual build explanation. |
| [`docs/html/governance-ethics-system-build.html`](../../html/governance-ethics-system-build.html) | Deep vertical detail, evidence patterns. |
| [`docs/book-development/manuscript-ordered/10-transparency-disclosure-and-trust.md`](../../book-development/manuscript-ordered/10-transparency-disclosure-and-trust.md) | Ethical disclosure themes (paraphrase). |
| [`docs/book-development/manuscript-ordered/15-practice-parameters.md`](../../book-development/manuscript-ordered/15-practice-parameters.md) | Practice boundaries language. |
| [`docs/notes/mvmtl-running-notes-founder-input-2026-04.md`](../../notes/mvmtl-running-notes-founder-input-2026-04.md) | Maturity stage **governance & ethics** as documented principles; Ray Dalio–style clarity **as analogy only** — mark as analogy. |

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Separates **governance** (decision rights, publishing rules) from **ethics** (disclosure, formation) without doubling word count of the vertical page.
- [ ] Clear **deliverables list** at sprint end (artifacts) aligned with modular sprint doc.
- [ ] Links up to **System builds hub** (Prompt 08) and sideways to **Discovery lab** if sequencing matters.
